variants: Pick your topic. Write 1 sentence: 'I post about ___.'
Choose what you'll post about. Type one line in your notes app.
Open notes and finish this: 'I post about ___.' Fill it in now.

variants: Pick your app. Choose TikTok, YouTube, or Instagram — one only.
Decide your platform. TikTok, YouTube, or IG. Pick one right now.
Choose where you'll post. One platform. TikTok, YouTube, or IG.
tasks.why: One platform beats three half-done ones every time.

variants: Study creators. Search your topic and follow 3 people posting it.
Follow 3 accounts already posting what you want to post.
Find 3 creators in your topic and follow them right now.
tasks.why: Watching others helps you learn what works fast.

variants: Set up your profile. Add a photo and write one sentence in your bio.
Make your profile real. Upload a photo and a one-line bio right now.
Update your profile. Add a photo and write: what you post + who it's for.

variants: Watch a creator. Pick one you followed and watch their top video fully.
Study one video. Open someone you followed and watch it start to finish.
Pick one creator from yesterday. Watch their most viewed video all the way through.

variants: Write post ideas. List 3 things you could make a video about.
Brainstorm 3 post ideas in your notes app right now.
List 3 things you know about your topic that others might not.

variants: Pick your easiest idea. Choose the simplest one from your list.
Look at your 3 ideas. Pick the one that takes least effort to make.
Choose one idea to post today. The easiest one wins.

variants: Film a video. Record 60 seconds about your topic and save it.
Make the post. Film or write it — keep it under 60 seconds.
Record one short clip about your topic. Don't edit. Just film.

variants: Post it. Hit publish now. It doesn't have to be great.
Post what you made. Done beats perfect every time.
Publish now. Your first post breaks the hardest barrier — starting.

variants: Check your stats. Open your post and look at views and likes.
Read your numbers. See how many people watched yesterday's post.

variants: Post again. Make one more short video and publish it today.
Post today. Pick any idea from your list and film a 60-second clip.
Create and post one short thing right now. Use a new idea.

variants: Reply to comments. Answer every comment on your post from yesterday.
Leave a comment. Find one post on your topic and write something real.

variants: Study openings. Watch 2 videos and pay attention to the first 3 seconds only.
Watch 2 posts. Notice exactly how each one starts — word for word.

variants: Post a video. Film 60 seconds about your topic and publish it now.

variants: Reply to comments. Go through your posts and answer every comment.
